eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 2:16 PM on SEP 17, 2019 Effective until 12:16 AM SEP 18, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Silver Alert has been issued for  Maricopa County.  This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety.  Chandler Police Department is looking for Harl Chamberlain Junior. He is a white male  last seen on foot at 1010 E Chandler Boulevard. He suffers from Dementia. If you have contact with the Silver Alert, Please call 911.  Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
